name: Black-Bottom Banana Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar in a mixing bowl until smooth.
2. Add the egg and vanilla extract, then beat until thoroughly combined.
3. Blend in the mashed bananas until just mixed.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture and mix well.
6. Divide the batter into two equal parts.
7. Add cocoa to one part of the batter and spread it evenly in a greased 13-in x 9-in x 2-in baking pan.
8. Spoon the remaining batter over the cocoa layer and swirl with a knife.
9. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until the bars are set when tested with a toothpick.
10. Allow to cool completely before serving.
